name: npu-text-tools
title: NPU Text Tools
description: On-device text rewriting and cleanup using Phi-Silica via Windows Copilot Runtime.
author: user

commands.name: fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar
commands.description: Correct spelling and grammar without changing meaning.

commands.name: make-formal
commands.title: Make Formal
commands.description: Rewrite text in a professional tone.

commands.name: make-concise
commands.title: Make Concise
commands.description: Shorten text to its essential points.

commands.name: bullet-points
commands.title: Bullet Points
commands.description: Convert prose into a bullet point list.

commands.name: simplify
commands.title: Simplify
commands.description: Rewrite in plain, easy-to-understand language.

commands.name: custom-rewrite
commands.title: Custom Rewrite
commands.description: Describe how you want the text rewritten.

commands.name: verify-selection-helper
commands.title: Verify Text Selection Helper
commands.description: Checks that TextSelectionHelper.exe exists and runs (noop). Use after publish or if selection commands fail.

commands.name: pasteback-fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar (Paste Selection)
commands.description: Assign a global hotkey in Raycast: capture selection, rewrite, paste back (no review UI).

commands.name: pasteback-make-formal
commands.title: Make Formal (Paste Selection)
commands.description: Hotkey-friendly: capture selection, rewrite, paste back.

commands.name: pasteback-make-concise
commands.title: Make Concise (Paste Selection)
commands.description: Hotkey-friendly: capture selection, rewrite, paste back.

commands.name: pasteback-bullet-points
commands.title: Bullet Points (Paste Selection)
commands.description: Hotkey-friendly: capture selection, rewrite, paste back.

commands.name: pasteback-simplify
commands.title: Simplify (Paste Selection)
commands.description: Hotkey-friendly: capture selection, rewrite, paste back.

commands.name: pasteback-custom-rewrite
commands.title: Custom Rewrite (Paste Selection)
commands.description: Uses “Quick custom instruction” preference; capture selection, rewrite, paste back.

commands.name: review-fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar (Review Selection)
commands.description: Dismisses Raycast, captures selection, rewrites, then opens a review pane (Enter to replace).

commands.name: review-make-formal
commands.title: Make Formal (Review Selection)
commands.description: Dismisses Raycast, captures selection, rewrites, then opens a review pane.

commands.name: review-make-concise
commands.title: Make Concise (Review Selection)
commands.description: Dismisses Raycast, captures selection, rewrites, then opens a review pane.

commands.name: review-bullet-points
commands.title: Bullet Points (Review Selection)
commands.description: Dismisses Raycast, captures selection, rewrites, then opens a review pane.

commands.name: review-simplify
commands.title: Simplify (Review Selection)
commands.description: Dismisses Raycast, captures selection, rewrites, then opens a review pane.

commands.name: review-custom-rewrite
commands.title: Custom Rewrite (Review Selection)
commands.description: Uses Quick custom instruction; dismisses Raycast, captures, rewrites, review pane.

commands.name: review-selection-pane
commands.title: Review Selection (Internal)
commands.description: Opened automatically after a Review Selection command. You can ignore this in Root Search.

preferences.name: prefillFromClipboard
preferences.title: Prefill From Clipboard
preferences.description: When enabled, text tools pre-fill with clipboard text on launch.
preferences.label: Prefill with clipboard text

preferences.name: showSuccessToasts
preferences.title: Show Success Toasts
preferences.description: When enabled, shows a success toast after a rewrite operation.
preferences.label: Show success notifications

preferences.name: ensureModelReady
preferences.title: Ensure AI Model Ready
preferences.description: When enabled, calls EnsureReadyAsync before AI operations to avoid 'NotReady' errors.
preferences.label: Wait for AI model readiness

preferences.name: quickCustomInstruction
preferences.title: Quick Custom Instruction
preferences.description: Used by Custom … (Paste/Review Selection) commands when there is no form to type an instruction.
preferences.placeholder: e.g. Turn this into a polite email

preferences.name: selectionCopyDelayMs
preferences.title: Selection Copy Delay
preferences.description: Wait after simulated Ctrl+C before reading the clipboard. Increase if selection capture fails in slow apps.

preferences.name: selectionFocusReleaseMs
preferences.title: Focus Wait (Max)
preferences.description: Native helper polls up to this long until the foreground window is not Raycast, then sends Copy/Paste. Increase if capture still fails after reloading the extension.
